name: property managers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For property managers processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient vendor management causes late orders and supplier penalties. We automate vendor management instead of manual tracking and reporting via spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inefficient vendor management leads to late orders and supplier penalties.
